summary: The diff implements a comprehensive color scheme redesign replacing the old crimson/gold/ivory Indian couture palette with a deep teal and champagne/sand palette. CSS custom properties in frontend/src/index.css are updated, Tailwind config is overhauled with new teal/champagne/sand color tokens replacing gold/crimson/ivory/maroon, and inline color references across components and pages (Header, Footer, CartDrawer, Chatbox, ProductCard, AdminPage, CategoryPage, HomePage, OffersPage, SuitabilityChecker, VirtualTryOn, SearchPage, ProductDetailPage, AccessDeniedScreen, SareesPage) all use the new teal/champagne palette. One minor gap: the diff does not show changes to the root-level frontend/index.css file, only frontend/src/index.css.

missing_requirements.requirement: All CSS custom property color tokens in frontend/index.css (root-level) are updated to the new palette
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows frontend/src/index.css was updated but does not include any changes to the root-level frontend/index.css file, which is explicitly called out in the acceptance criteria as a required update target.
